mapper.select: select * from emp order by empno
mapper.insert: insert into emp (empno, ename, sal, deptno) values (#{empno}, #{ename}, #{sal}, #{deptno})
insert into emp (empno, ename, job, mgr, hiredate, sal, comm, deptno ) values (#{empno}, #{ename}, #{job}, #{mgr}, #{hiredate}, #{sal}, #{comm}, #{deptno})
